channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Build a Multi-Agent Analysis System with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#
item.description: Build a multi-agent analysis system with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#. Learn the AgentBase reusable pattern, SystemMessageMode.Replace for agent isolation, sequential AgentPipeline orchestration, and specialist agent design. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/31/build-a-multiagent-analysis-system-with-github-copilot-sdk-in-c

item.title: Factory Method Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: See Factory Method pattern in action with a complete real-world C# example. Step-by-step implementation of a payment processing system using factory methods. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/31/factory-method-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: C# Source Generator Attributes: Generating Code with ForAttributeWithMetadataName
item.description: Learn how C# source generator attributes trigger code generation in .NET. Complete guide to the marker attribute pattern with ForAttributeWithMetadataName. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/30/c-source-generator-attributes-generating-code-with-forattributewithmetadataname

item.title: GitHub Copilot SDK vs Semantic Kernel: When to Use Each in C#
item.description: GitHub Copilot SDK vs Semantic Kernel in C# -- a practical comparison. Understand when to use each framework, their key differences, and how to choose for your .NET AI applications. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/30/github-copilot-sdk-vs-semantic-kernel-when-to-use-each-in-c

item.title: When to Use Observer Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use observer pattern in C# with a practical decision guide, code examples, and real scenarios for event-driven architecture. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/30/when-to-use-observer-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: Multi-Model Support in GitHub Copilot SDK: GPT-5 vs Claude in C#
item.description: Learn multi-model support in GitHub Copilot SDK: configure GPT-5 and Claude in C#, compare capabilities, build model-agnostic .NET apps. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/29/multimodel-support-in-github-copilot-sdk-gpt5-vs-claude-in-c

item.title: Should You Talk To Your Manager About Burnout? - Dev Leader Weekly 133
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss how to approach talking to your manager about burnout -- what to say, how to frame it, and what you should actually expect from the conversation. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/29/should-you-talk-to-your-manager-about-burnout-dev-leader-weekly-133

item.title: Factory Method vs Abstract Factory Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Understand the differences between Factory Method and Abstract Factory patterns in C# with code examples, use cases, and guidance on choosing the right pattern. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/29/factory-method-vs-abstract-factory-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: Session Hooks and Event Handling in GitHub Copilot SDK for C#
item.description: Master session hooks and event handling in GitHub Copilot SDK for C#. Intercept requests, handle streaming, and build observable AI apps. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/28/session-hooks-and-event-handling-in-github-copilot-sdk-for-c

item.title: How to Implement Observer Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement observer pattern in C# with step-by-step code examples covering custom observers, C# events, and IObservable integration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/28/how-to-implement-observer-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: C# Source Generators: Reading the Roslyn Syntax Tree
item.description: Master reading and traversing a Roslyn syntax tree in a C# source generator. Learn SyntaxTree, SemanticModel, and ForAttributeWithMetadataName for .NET 6+. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/27/c-source-generators-reading-the-roslyn-syntax-tree

item.title: Custom AI Tools with AIFunctionFactory in GitHub Copilot SDK for C#
item.description: Learn to build custom AI tools with AIFunctionFactory in GitHub Copilot SDK for C#. Working code examples and best practices included. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/27/custom-ai-tools-with-aifunctionfactory-in-github-copilot-sdk-for-c

item.title: Factory Method Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master Factory Method pattern best practices in C#. Learn code organization strategies, interface design, DI integration, and maintainability tips. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/27/factory-method-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: Build a Repository Analysis Bot with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#
item.description: Build a repository analysis bot with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#. Learn SystemMessageMode.Replace for agent personas, read-only tools, dual console and StringBuilder output, and batch processing. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/26/build-a-repository-analysis-bot-with-github-copilot-sdk-in-c

item.title: Incremental Source Generators in C#: The Right Way to Build Them
item.description: Learn the incremental source generator API in C# -- covers pipeline design, caching with IEquatable, performance tips, and best practices for modern .NET. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/26/incremental-source-generators-in-c-the-right-way-to-build-them

item.title: Observer Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the observer design pattern in C# with practical code examples, event-driven architecture guidance, and real-world use cases. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/26/observer-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: Build an Interactive Coding Agent with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#
item.description: Build an interactive coding agent with GitHub Copilot SDK in C#. Learn persistent CopilotSession management, file read/write tools, run_dotnet_build feedback, and the REPL agent loop. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/25/build-an-interactive-coding-agent-with-github-copilot-sdk-in-c

item.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration in Microsoft Agent Framework in C#
item.description: Master multi-agent orchestration in Microsoft Agent Framework in C# with a real research app. Revision loops, quality gates, and context passing explained. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/25/multiagent-orchestration-in-microsoft-agent-framework-in-c

item.title: Singleton Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Singleton pattern real-world example in C#: complete implementation of a configuration manager with thread-safe initialization, code examples, and practical use case demonstration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/03/25/singleton-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation
